title: Verification of Homepage Load Time
steps: Navigate to the homepage and verify the load time.
expected_result: Load time should be less than 5345 ms.

title: Verification of Website Title
steps: Navigate to the homepage and verify the website title.
expected_result: Website title should match 'Automation Testing Practice Website for QA and Developers | UI and API'.

title: Check Accessibility of Buttons
steps: Navigate to the homepage and check if buttons have appropriate ARIA roles.

title: Check UX for Dynamic Pagination Table
steps: Navigate to 'https://practice.expandtesting.com/dynamic-pagination-table' and verify if the pagination is user-friendly.
expected_result: Pagination should have clear navigation buttons and proper data display.

title: Check for Missing Security Headers
steps: Navigate to the homepage and verify if security headers are present.

title: Test Input Field Validation on Registration Form
steps: Navigate to 'https://practice.expandtesting.com/register' and verify if the registration form validates input fields properly.

title: Check Load Time of Sample Links
steps: Navigate to the provided sample links and verify their load time.

title: Check for SSL on External Links
steps: Navigate to the provided external links and verify if they have a valid SSL certificate.
expected_result: All links should have a valid SSL certificate.

title: Check Page Speed on Sample Links
steps: Navigate to the provided sample links and verify their page speed scores.
expected_result: Page speed scores should be acceptable.

title: Test Login and Registration with Invalid Credentials
steps: Navigate to 'https://practice.expandtesting.com/notes/app/login' and 'https://practice.expandtesting.com/register' and verify if the system rejects invalid login credentials.
expected_result: System should reject login attempts with invalid credentials.
